item.name: Trailtrout
item.description:
Coveted for its fatty flesh, this type of trout dwells in the depths of Lake Toari.

[Suitable for display in aquariums tier 2 and higher.]
[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: It is said that the Hhetsarro study the fat deposits of the trailtrout to get a sense for the changing seasons and plan their next migration.
